subcodes.first_line: My spirit be a sacrifice unto Thy love! This petition, with its preamble omitted, layeth its essential purpose before Thy holy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحبک الفداء این عریضه محذوف المقدمه اصل مطالب خدمت آنحضرت معروض میشود
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @wisdom [hikmat]
